title: Survive 100
description: Recreation of famous youtube series: Survive 100 days in ...
body:
## ⛰️ 100 DAYS: ALONE IN THE WILDERNESS
**"Can you survive the first night? Most don't."
Have you ever watched a 100 Days survival video and thought: "I could do that"? Now is your chance to prove it. 100 Days: Alone in the Wilderness isn't just a modpack—it’s cinematic test of your survival instincts.**

### 🌲 THE CHALLENGE
You are dropped into a massive, realistic landscape. Your goal is simple: Stay alive for 100 days. But between the freezing nights, the realistic thirst, and predators that actually hunt you, next day is never a guarantee.

### ⚠️ WHAT MAKES THIS DIFFERENT?
**PHYSICAL HEALTH:** Forget the vanilla health bar. If a bear bites your leg, you limp. If you fall from a cliff, you break bones. You'll need bandages, morphine, and time to heal.

**PROPER HUNTING:** No more "punching cows." You must process your kills. Use a meat hook, skin your prey, and use every part of the animal to survive.

**BEYOND THE HORIZON:** With Distant Horizons rendering, you can see for miles. Watch the storm clouds roll in over distant peaks before they hit your camp.

**THE TURNING OF SEASONS:** You might start in a beautiful spring, but Winter is coming. If you haven't stockpiled food and fuel by Day 60, the frost will claim you.
